title: Missing - Round Remix
lyrics:
5 ContributorsMissing (Round Remix) Lyrics
Do you still believe in you and me?
Are we all we could be? Is it meant to be?


Do you still believe in you and me?
Are we all we could be? Is it meant to be?


My heart is beating in a different way
Been gone such a long time, I don't feel the same


Do you still believe in you and me?
Are we all we could be? Is it meant to be?

My heart is beating in a different way
Been gone such a long time, I don't feel the same

Are we all we could be?
Is it meant to be?
Is it meant to be?

In you and me?
